ETHACRYNIC ACID reduces swelling related to heart, kidney, liver, or lung disease. It may also be used to reduce swelling caused by cancer. It helps your kidneys remove more fluid and salt from your blood through the urine. It belongs to a group of medications called diuretics.

FUROSEMIDE treats high blood pressure. It may also be used to reduce swelling related to heart, kidney, or liver disease. It helps your kidneys remove more fluid and salt from your blood through the urine. It belongs to a group of medications called diuretics.

Probenecid is a medicine commonly used to treat gout by reducing uric acid in the body. It can affect how the kidneys remove other medicines, including Macrodantin. Taking them together may reduce the amount of nitrofurantoin that is cleared from the body, which can increase the drug levels and potentially casuse side effects.

Antacids that contain magnesium, such as Gaviscon, are used to reduce stomach acidity and relieve heartburn or indigestion. When taken with Macrodantin, these antacids may reduce how much of the antibiotic is absorbed into the body, making it less effective in treating infections.

Taking Macrodantin with food helps the medicine to be absorbed better into the bloodstream and reduces stomach irritation. Eating meals or snacks at the same time as the medicine can also help prevent nausea or vomiting, making the treatment easier to tolerate.
